prediction.reasoning: As an AI, I cannot access real-time market data or predict future stock movements with certainty. This prediction is based on a generalized statistical model assuming a typical daily volatility for a moderately traded asset. The point estimate for 1 day is kept very close to the current price ($204.13), reflecting a neutral or very slight drift given no specific market catalysts. The confidence intervals are calculated using a simulated daily standard deviation of approximately 1% of the current price (around $2.04), applying standard z-scores for a normal distribution. This methodology provides a hypothetical range of potential prices but should not be considered financial advice.
